name: Dijon Vinaigrette Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the garlic to a food processor and process until finely chopped.
2. Add the dill, tarragon, parsley, salt, pepper, dijon mustard, and rice wine vinegar to the food processor with the minced garlic.
3. Process all ingredients together until smooth.
4. Slowly drizzle in the olive oil while the food processor is running to emulsify the dressing.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
6. Transfer the dressing to a jar and store in the refrigerator until ready to use.
